name: Maraschino Pecan Bread (Eb)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 tablespoons maraschino cherries, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the water, bread flour, dry milk, sugars, salt, butter, raisins, maraschino cherries, sunflower seeds, pecans, cinnamon, and ginger until combined.
2. Gradually add the yeast to the mixture and stir until well incorporated.
3. Place the dough in a greased loaf pan and shape it into a loaf.
4. Let the dough rise until doubled in size.
5. Bake on the regular cycle of your oven.
